blocks.content: The Unknown Depths of Humanity (4)

blocks.speaker: Seriel
blocks.content: Chief Researcher.
Seriel snapped back to reality at the sound of the door opening.

blocks.speaker: Seriel
blocks.content: It's time to attend the Holy War Conference.

blocks.speaker: Seriel
blocks.content: Got it.
She put out her cigarette and spread the smell with her hands, gathering her thoughts as she put on her gown.

blocks.speaker: Seriel
blocks.content: Right. I have to meet them at least once anyway.
As she stepped into the hallway, the WHO delegation approached, escorted by knights.

blocks.speaker: Seriel
blocks.content: Let's go, Seriel.

blocks.speaker: Seriel
blocks.content: Yes.
The main hall of the Holy War resembled a small coliseum that could hold about 600 people.
As all attendees took their seats, the chairman of the Holy War stepped onto the podium.

blocks.speaker: Chairman
blocks.content: We will now begin the 63rd Holy War.
The number 63 was a historical milestone, marking each global event that had called for a conference.

blocks.speaker: Chairman
blocks.content: Today, we are here to elect the World Leadership Council. The Leadership Council exists for the happiness and prosperity of all humanity…
Even as the speech continued, think tanks from various countries were busy working.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: Each country's opening remarks are limited to 5 minutes. According to the vote, Tormia will go seventh.
Although the speech was prepared, it would need real-time adjustments based on other countries' speeches.

blocks.speaker: Chairman
blocks.content: With the opening of the Holy War, each country will have three rights. Rom signifies one vote that can be given to another country…
It was all familiar information.
When it was time for each department's proposals, Dorothy, acting head of Valkyrie, stepped up.

blocks.speaker: Dorothy
blocks.content: Hello. I am Dorothy, Chief Military Officer of Valkyrie. In this tense global situation, our military proposal is…
A man from Arachne raised his hand.

blocks.speaker: Pedra
blocks.content: Wait a moment.
His name was Pedra, a man who had risen from a pimp in his youth to Prime Minister.

blocks.speaker: Pedra
blocks.content: We only heard about the Chief Military Officer's resignation. We know nothing about the acting head. Shouldn't you explain why you took over before making a proposal?

blocks.speaker: Dorothy
blocks.content: I'm his girlfriend.

blocks.speaker: Pedra
blocks.content: Girlfriend… What is this?
Pedra's exaggerated gestures for agreement were met with silence.

blocks.speaker: Pedra
blocks.content: What? Am I the only one who finds this strange? Huh?

blocks.speaker: Dorothy
blocks.content: It means it's essentially vacant.
The country that became the Leadership Council would take over all of Valkyrie's authority.

blocks.speaker: Dorothy
blocks.content: …Therefore, our military proposal is a comprehensive solution for peace agreements. We hope each country's leadership makes the right decision.
Dorothy stepped down amid dry applause, and Smith, head of Economic and Social Affairs, took the stage.

blocks.speaker: Smith
blocks.content: I believe that a Leadership Council should have a vision for human prosperity. Due to the arms race, currency values are plummeting worldwide. Therefore, we urge decisive action from the World Bank and central banks of each country to curb reckless development of war weapons…

blocks.speaker: Liz
blocks.content: I object.
When Liz from Neid Group raised her hand, the chairman intervened.

blocks.speaker: Chairman
blocks.content: Wouldn't it be better to raise objections after the proposal?

blocks.speaker: Liz
blocks.content: No, I object to the proposal itself. The term 'reckless war weapons' could negatively interpret industries in countries currently at war.
Neid Group's main business was military supplies.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Good timing.
Lupist nodded.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Once the meeting progresses, it becomes fast and rough. It's not too late to attack proposals.

blocks.speaker: Smith
blocks.content: The core of this Holy War is world peace. Using strong language against war weapons isn't unusual…

blocks.speaker: Liz
blocks.content: Of course no country opposes peace. However, for fairness and considering different circumstances in each country, we should avoid terms that could exonerate specific nations. We request either deletion or replacement with clear terms.
Smith clicked his tongue.

blocks.speaker: Smith
blocks.content: We'll pause the proposal.
With permission from the chairman, Economic and Social Affairs staff huddled together.
Five minutes later, Smith returned to correct his statement.

blocks.speaker: Smith
blocks.content: We accept your suggestion and will replace 'reckless' with 'threatening human peace.'

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: This should do…
From now on, it depended on execution.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: You made a good point. It would have been embarrassing for our king to intervene.

blocks.speaker: Liz
blocks.content: Liz's objection resonated because she represented an industry directly affected by this proposal.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Yes. If not an entrepreneur like her, it would be misinterpreted.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: April Liz is Neid Group's current head. She has practical experience and seems sharp now.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: It was significant that only Liz stood up among renowned economists present.
She doesn't care about royal favor. It means she understands Tormia's intentions well enough to be entrusted with an executive role.
As Liz sat down after finishing her proposal, Pedra clapped his hands.

blocks.speaker: Pedra
blocks.content: Haha! You're quite a woman. Your company must have a good secretary. Congratulations.

blocks.speaker: Liz
blocks.content: I don't think it's something to laugh about. And I'm not a secretary; I'm CEO of Neid Group.
Pedra squinted his eyes.

blocks.speaker: Pedra
blocks.content: Huh? Neid Group? So you're its next head after pushing out Mr. Neid?

blocks.speaker: Liz
blocks.content: Nope! I'm his girlfriend.
Although she co-founded Neid Military Supplies with him but this response sufficed for now.

blocks.speaker: Pedra
blocks.content: My goodness! Tormia is quite something too! Girlfriend? What kind of introduction is this?

blocks.speaker: Aide
blocks.content: Heheh! Indeed.

blocks.speaker: Pedra
blocks.content: You're no better yourself! You trashy human being.
Regardless of position or gender Pedra epitomized disgust.

blocks.speaker: King Gis
blocks.content: Who is that guy, a thug? Does he think this is a marketplace?

blocks.speaker: Smoke
blocks.content: He's the real power behind Arachne. He rose to Prime Minister through nighttime politics.
King Gis's expression immediately turned favorable.

blocks.speaker: King Gis
blocks.content: Now I see, he's been through tough times. Arrange a meeting.

blocks.speaker: Smoke
blocks.content: Yes.
Meanwhile, Pope Constantine, the head of the Department of Religion, stepped onto the podium.

blocks.speaker: Pope Constantine
blocks.content: Let us pray.
Oh dear.
Gis hurriedly straightened up, clasped his hands, and closed his eyes.
The prayer began.

blocks.speaker: Pope Constantine
blocks.content: O God of Cria, all humanity is suffering. Save us from this cruel world…
During this, Shirone watched the backs of those bowing their heads.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How many of them?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How many truly pray for humanity's happiness?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If everyone considers others, no one will end up harmed. It's theoretically possible, but…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Is it really?

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: It must be unsettling.
Humans are not Gaians.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Give it up, Shirone. The world you dream of will never come. Because Eve crossed the forbidden line.

blocks.speaker: Gando
blocks.content: Your Majesty.

blocks.speaker: Gando
blocks.content: I have something to discuss about deploying shadow warriors.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: I said no. The idea of someone looking exactly like me is unsettling. Besides, Kido will be by my side.
It saddened her that the only being she trusted was a goblin, not a human.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: But we must prepare for the possibility of Kido being breached.
Hmm.
Uorin glanced at Havitz.
The sight of Satan falling into a sweet sleep while listening to the Pope's prayer…

blocks.speaker: Pope Constantine
blocks.content: Punish the evil of the world!
The Pope raised his voice, and Gis shed tears.

blocks.speaker: Gis
blocks.content: Sniff! Oh God.
Uorin turned her gaze from the snoring Havitz and continued.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: As long as it's not Vanishing, it's fine. There's no Ymir or Rian. There's nothing we can't handle. The ones who should worry about royal assassination are other countries, not Kashan.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: But keep an eye on Tormia. Handle all incoming intelligence with care.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Tormia… you mean?

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Yes. They have Kuan.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: The only swordsman who beheaded Havitz.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: If it's an underground operation, the only one to watch out for besides Havitz is him. Honestly, it's questionable if we can even stop him.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Then even more reason for shadow warriors—

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: I said it's fine.
Uorin looked at Siina, who was listening to the prayer with a serene posture.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: She looked beautiful and intelligent.
Albino of Yongrae, pretending to pray, felt a gaze and turned his head.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: When his eyes met Uorin's, he smiled awkwardly, but his inner thoughts were different.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: Why do you keep staring? It's annoying.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: He knew the reason well.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: Hehe, your nape must be itching. In terms of VIP assassination, Kashan's nemesis is us.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: Both Havitz and Kuan wield deadly swords, but Tormia can afford to lose their king.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: Of course, it's risky. If the assassination's mastermind is revealed, public opinion will worsen. But in an emergency, it's a card that can be used once.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: Thus, in a trade-off, the fatal blow would be to Kashan.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: But it's a difficult sword to handle. Well, the same goes for Havitz.
Albino stroked his beard.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: Still undecided? Foolish.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: Parka Kuan.
200 meters from Delta's main building, the guards of 12 countries were all gathered.
The Holy War had drawn a long line, and stepping beyond it would be considered an act of aggression.

blocks.speaker: Rai
blocks.content: Are you Captain Rai of Gangshin's guards?

blocks.speaker: Rai
blocks.content: Yes, I am.
Despite knowing the intensity of the Holy War, the knights' eyes sparkled.

blocks.speaker: Knight
blocks.content: Oh, then you're the brother of Ogent Rian?

blocks.speaker: Rai
blocks.content: Ah, sorry if I was rude. But he's the only one who can face Ymir.

blocks.speaker: Knight
blocks.content: Are you saying I shouldn't feel inferior?

blocks.speaker: Rai
blocks.content: No, that's not what I meant… though it might be true.

blocks.speaker: Rai
blocks.content: They wouldn't understand.

blocks.speaker: Rai
blocks.content: No one knew what it was like to be the brother of the world's strongest swordsman.

blocks.speaker: Rai
blocks.content: Why am I here?

blocks.speaker: Rai
blocks.content: Because all those more capable than him were dead?

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Captain.
Tess's voice brought him back to reality.

blocks.speaker: Rai
blocks.content: Protect the king. That's all that matters.
At that moment, Rai felt a chill down his spine, and the guards of 12 countries simultaneously turned.

blocks.speaker: Knight
blocks.content: Who goes there!
The sound of swords being drawn as one created a deafening noise.

blocks.speaker: Knight
blocks.content: That is…
A one-armed swordsman was limping towards them.
